name: cdk-aurora-globaldatabase

metadata.name: cdk-aurora-globaldatabase
metadata.summary: cdk-aurora-globaldatabase is an AWS CDK construct library that provides Cross Region Create Global Aurora RDS Databases.

modules.name: cdk_aurora_globaldatabase

methods.name: cdk_aurora_globaldatabase.GlobalAuroraRDSMaster.__init__
documentation:
---
param credentials: '(experimental) Credentials to use for the RDS database. Default:
  - creates new credentials'
param db_clusterp_pg: '(experimental) RDS ParameterGroup. Default: - Aurora MySQL
  ParameterGroup'
param db_user_name: '(experimental) RDS default Super User Name. Default: - sysadmin'
param default_database_name: '(experimental) RDS default Database Name. Default: -
  globaldatabase'
param deletion_protection: '(experimental) Global RDS Database Cluster Engine Deletion
  Protection Option . Default: - false'
param engine_version: '(experimental) RDS Database Cluster Engine . Default: - rds.DatabaseClusterEngine.auroraMysql({version:
  rds.AuroraMysqlEngineVersion.VER_2_07_1,})'
param id: '-'
param instance_type: '(experimental) RDS Instance Type only can use r4 or r5 type
  see more <https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/AuroraUserGuide/aurora-global-database.html#aurora-global-database.limitations>.
  Default: - r5.large'
param monitoring_interval: '(experimental) The interval, in seconds, between points
  when Amazon RDS collects enhanced monitoring metrics for the DB instances. Default:
  no enhanced monitoring'
param monitoring_role: '(experimental) Role that will be used to manage DB instances
  monitoring. Default: - A role is automatically created for you'
param parameters: '(experimental) RDS Parameters. Default: - {time_zone: ''UTC''}'
param rds_password: (experimental) return RDS Cluster password.
param scope: '-'
param security_groups: '(experimental) Credentials to use for the RDS database. Default:
  - []'
param storage_encrypted: '(experimental) Global RDS Database Cluster Engine Storage
  Encrypted Option . Default: - true'
param time_zone: '(experimental) RDS time zone. Default: - MySQLtimeZone.UTC'
param vpc: '(experimental) RDS default VPC. Default: - new VPC'
stability: experimental
---

methods.name: cdk_aurora_globaldatabase.GlobalAuroraRDSMaster.add_regional_cluster
documentation:
---
param db_parameter_group: true
param db_subnet_group_name: true
param id: '-'
param region: true
param scope: '-'
param security_group_id: true
stability: experimental
---

documentation:

:stability: experimental

:stability: experimental

methods.name: cdk_aurora_globaldatabase.GlobalAuroraRDSMaster.rds_instance_type
documentation:

methods.name: cdk_aurora_globaldatabase.GlobalAuroraRDSMaster.rds_is_public
documentation:
(experimental) return RDS Cluster is Public ?

:stability: experimental

methods.name: cdk_aurora_globaldatabase.GlobalAuroraRDSMaster.rds_password
documentation:
(experimental) return RDS Cluster password.

if not define props.rdsPassword , password will stored in Secret Manager
Please use this command get password back , "aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id secret name"

:stability: experimental
